title: subworkflow - dynatrace get workflow executions
description:
Subworkflow to retrieve and analyze workflow execution history

This subworkflow queries past workflow executions to monitor performance and success rates.

Parameters:

workflowId: (Optional) Filter by specific workflow ID
status: (Optional) Filter by status (SUCCESS, FAILED, RUNNING)
timeFrameMinutes: (Optional) Look-back time in minutes - default 1440
limit: (Optional) Maximum executions to return - default 50

Returns execution records with status and metrics
guide:
## 📊 **Subworkflow to Get Workflow Executions**

📈 This subworkflow retrieves workflow execution history to monitor performance and success rates.

Enables SLA tracking, troubleshooting, and operational visibility.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **workflowId** (Optional): 🆔 Filter by workflow ID
- **status** (Optional): 📊 Filter by status  
  *(SUCCESS, FAILED, RUNNING)*
- **timeFrameMinutes** (Optional): 🕐 Look-back time (default 1440)
- **limit** (Optional): 📋 Max executions (default 50)

---

### 📊 **Execution States**

- **SUCCESS**: Execution completed successfully
- **FAILED**: Execution failed
- **RUNNING**: Execution in progress

---

### 🧠 **Usage Context**

- ✅ Performance monitoring
- ✅ SLA tracking
- ✅ Troubleshooting
- ✅ Success rate analysis

---
